<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Watervark (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-hâi]][[de:Wasser-Schwein]][[hak:Kui-hoi]][[ja:癸亥]][[ko:계해]][[vi:Quý Hợi]][[za:Gveiqhaih]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-hāi]][[zh-yue:癸亥]][[zh:癸亥]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Watervark (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-hâi]][[de:Wasser-Schwein]][[hak:Kui-hoi]][[ja:癸亥]][[ko:계해]][[vi:Quý Hợi]][[za:Gveiqhaih]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-hāi]][[zh-yue:癸亥]][[zh:癸亥]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Watervark (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-hâi]][[de:Wasser-Schwein]][[hak:Kui-hoi]][[ja:癸亥]][[ko:계해]][[vi:Quý Hợi]][[za:Gveiqhaih]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-hāi]][[zh-yue:癸亥]][[zh:癸亥]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Pig|kanji=癸亥|romaji=mizunoto i|onyomi=kigai|p=guǐhài|w=kuei-hai|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ xaɪ̯|y=gwai2 hoi6|j=gwai2 hoi6|ci=kʷɐi hɐi|mc=kjwɨj ɣəi|oc-bs=kʷeʔ ɢəʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Water Pig also known as 癸亥''' (mizu no toi, kisui no inoshishi, kigai) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 60th (last) combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Rinxu|ja|1=Yang Water Dog|2=ja|壬戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wood Rat|en|Wood Rat|WD=Q1190890|lt=Yang Wood Rat|1=Yang Wood Rat}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Water|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Water|13=User:Immanuelle/Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|qq=}}, and the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}} symbol {{ill|Pig (zodiac)|en|Pig (zodiac)|WD=Q877261|lt=Pig (亥)|1=Pig (zodiac)}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Water|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Water|13=User:Immanuelle/Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|qq=}}, forming a harmonious relationship ({{ill|Hiwa|ja|比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|qq=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|4=el|5=Ου Σιν|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiwa|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiwa|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Water Pig (癸亥)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐhài
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 hoi6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-i
***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-inoshishi
***Onyomi 1: kigai
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyehae (계해)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Hợi

<!--
==
* Yin Water Pig (癸亥) 
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐhài
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 hoi6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi: みずのといのしし (mizunoto-inoshishi)
***Onyomi: きかのいのしし (kika-no-inoshishi)
***Onyomi: きがい (kigai)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyehae
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Hợi

-->
==Years of Yin Water Pig==
A year in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} that leaves a remainder of 3 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|Year|en|Year|WD=Q577|lt=year|1=Year}} of {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Yin Water Pig (癸亥)'s years table'''
|-
! {{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|WD=Q25868|lt=1st Millennium|1=1st millennium}} !! {{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|WD=Q25860|lt=2nd Millennium|1=2nd millennium}} !! {{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|WD=Q26224|lt=3rd Millennium|1=3rd millennium}}
|-
|
* {{ill|3 AD|ja|3年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/3|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=3 AD|comment=enwiki is a redirect|1=AD 3|WD=Q19636}}
* {{ill|AD 63|en|AD 63|WD=Q30471|lt=63 AD|1=AD 63}}
* {{ill|AD 123|en|AD 123|WD=Q33127|lt=123 AD|1=AD 123}}
* {{ill|183|en|183|WD=Q31386|lt=183 AD|1=183}}
* {{ill|243|en|243|WD=Q32076|lt=243 AD|1=243}}
* {{ill|303|en|303|WD=Q31957|lt=303 AD|1=303}}
* {{ill|363|en|363|WD=Q47962|lt=363 AD|1=363}}
* {{ill|423|en|423|WD=Q31205|lt=423 AD|1=423}}
* {{ill|483|en|483|WD=Q30492|lt=483 AD|1=483}}
* {{ill|543|en|543|WD=Q30321|lt=543 AD|1=543}}
* {{ill|603|en|603|WD=Q31050|lt=603 AD|1=603}}
* {{ill|663|en|663|WD=Q31122|lt=663 AD|1=663}}
* {{ill|723|en|723|WD=Q23545|lt=723 AD|1=723}}
* {{ill|783|en|783|WD=Q30557|lt=783 AD|1=783}}
* {{ill|843|en|843|WD=Q23469|lt=843 AD|1=843}}
* {{ill|903|en|903|WD=Q23630|lt=903 AD|1=903}}
* {{ill|963|en|963|WD=Q23562|lt=963 AD|1=963}}
|
* {{ill|1023|en|1023|WD=Q19263|lt=1023 AD|1=1023}}
* {{ill|1083|en|1083|WD=Q19455|lt=1083 AD|1=1083}}
* {{ill|1143|en|1143|WD=Q19617|lt=1143 AD|1=1143}}
* {{ill|1203|en|1203|WD=Q5227|lt=1203 AD|1=1203}}
* {{ill|1263|en|1263|WD=Q5512|lt=1263 AD|1=1263}}
* {{ill|1323|en|1323|WD=Q5771|lt=1323 AD|1=1323}}
* {{ill|1383|en|1383|WD=Q6341|lt=1383 AD|1=1383}}
* {{ill|1443|en|1443|WD=Q6417|lt=1443 AD|1=1443}}
* {{ill|1503|en|1503|WD=Q6141|lt=1503 AD|1=1503}}
* {{ill|1563|en|1563|WD=Q6629|lt=1563 AD|1=1563}}
* {{ill|1623|en|1623|WD=Q6818|lt=1623 AD|1=1623}}
* {{ill|1683|en|1683|WD=Q7651|lt=1683 AD|1=1683}}
* {{ill|1743|en|1743|WD=Q7580|lt=1743 AD|1=1743}}
* {{ill|1803|en|1803|WD=Q6887|lt=1803 AD|1=1803}}
* {{ill|1863|en|1863|WD=Q7701|lt=1863 AD|1=1863}}
* {{ill|1923|en|1923|WD=Q2169|lt=1923 AD|1=1923}}
* {{ill|1983|en|1983|WD=Q2434|lt=1983 AD|1=1983}}
|
* {{ill|2043 AD|ja|2043年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2043|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2043 AD|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}
* {{ill|2103 AD|ja|2103年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2103|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2103 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 2100年代|1=2100s|WD=Q1209304}}
* {{ill|2163 AD|ja|2163年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2163|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2163 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 22世紀|1=22nd century|WD=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2223 AD|ja|2223年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2223|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2223 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 23世紀|1=23rd century|WD=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2283 AD|ja|2283年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2283|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2283 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 23世紀|1=23rd century|WD=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2343 AD|ja|2343年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2343|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2343 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2403 AD|ja|2403年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2403|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2403 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2463 AD|ja|2463年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2463|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2463 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 25世紀|1=25th century|WD=Q49839}}
* {{ill|2523 AD|ja|2523年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2523|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2523 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2583 AD|ja|2583年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2583|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2583 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2643 AD|ja|2643年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2643|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2643 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2703 AD|ja|2703年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2703|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2703 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2763 AD|ja|2763年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2763|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2763 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2823 AD|ja|2823年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2823|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2823 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2883 AD|ja|2883年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2883|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2883 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2943 AD|ja|2943年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2943|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2943 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
|}
==Months of Yin Water Pig==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|October|en|October|WD=Q124|lt=October|1=October}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)|1=Month}} of {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Beginning of Winter|1=Lidong}} until the day before {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Heavy Snow|1=Daxue (solar term)}}) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Water Pig==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kigai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the last day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

==See Also==
*{{prefix|qq=}}
*{{intitle|qq=}}

[[zh-min-nan:Teng-chik]]
[[zh-yue:丁丑]]

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yin Water Pig|qq=ja|癸亥|version=84123860|comment=Imported full ja history}}



[[cdo:Dĭng-cṳ̄de]]
[[nds:Feuer-Büffelvi]]
[[de:Yin Water Pig]]

[[ja:癸亥]]
[[zh:癸亥]]
[[ko:계해]]
[[fr:Cochon de eau]]
[[de:Wasser-Schwein]]

[[af:Vuuros (astrologie)]]
[[de:Feuer-Büffelen]]
[[en:Fire Ox]]
[[fr:Buffle de feushak]]
[[it:Ding-chṳ́id]]

[[ko:정축]]
[[vi:Đinh Sửu]]
[[za:Dingceij]]
[[zh:丁丑]]
[[ar:Yin Water Pig]]

<!--Yin Water Pig--><!--Yin Water Pig-->

<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Watervark (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Gŭi-hâi]]
[[hak:Kui-hoi]]
[[vi:Quý Hợi]]
[[za:Gveiqhaih]]
[[zh-min-nan:Kùi-hāi]]
[[zh-yue:癸亥]]
<!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Watervark (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Gŭi-hâi]]
[[hak:Kui-hoi]]
[[vi:Quý Hợi]]
[[za:Gveiqhaih]]
[[zh-min-nan:Kùi-hāi]]
[[zh-yue:癸亥]]
{{wikidata link|Q904914}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
